steps.title: Find the seaweed difference
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between sugar kelp and ma-konbu. The notes give that difference: sugar kelp has moderate umami intensity, while ma-konbu has high umami intensity.

steps.title: Contrast the umami levels
steps.content: A groups the seaweeds together, B shifts to tuna and soy sauce, and D only says both are brown seaweeds. The needed sentence must compare their umami intensity. The answer is C.
